text_block_list.text:
I'm headed to the library to do some research,
when...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ever the hard little worker, aren't you? Found
anything useful yet?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, well, it's pretty difficult to understand
these medical textbooks.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Apparently, the cause of motion sickness is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
To put it simply, it seems to occur due to a
mismatch between the information you receive
from your inner ear and your vision.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yikes. Is there any way of fixing it? Without doing
anything too risky, of course...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It seems that getting used to it really is the
simplest method.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But... Ugh, the thought of having to endure
feeling sick until I get used to it makes me feel...
well, sick.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well, hello there!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, hi! Do you mind sharing?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Th-this is...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's the park! Hehe, look at all those children.
They're having the time of their lives.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um, why are we here exactly? Wouldn't an
amusement park ride be better?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The... swings?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! You're right! They're like little rides! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I get it now! With these, I can ease myself into
things!

The motion of the swings shouldn't be too
intense. This'll make the perfect first step!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your help! I'll try it right away!
choice_data_list: Try to have fun with it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's take a little break. Are you feeling
okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I felt nauseous for a second there, but I'm
fine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
As soon as I start feeling sick, I can just kick out
my legs and stop, after all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I think I can keep this up for a while. Thank you so
much!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank goodness.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Still, these swings take me back... I'm the one
pushing the children now, but I remember when I
was the little one going up and down.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
With a big enough push, I felt like I could almost
reach the sky. Hehe, it was thrilling.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, then would you like to play on the swings
together this time? You can sit and I'll push you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You might not reach the sky, but as they always
say, "Look to the sky and you'll feel like you're
flying!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it'll be super fun, and I won't get sick
either!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well now! That does sound delightful. But let me
know if you feel sick at all.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll support you any way I can! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

After a short break, the two of them head to the
swings, smiling with childlike glee as they go.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You're right! I will!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't remember getting sick on swings as a
child... Hehe, I'm gonna swing as hard as I can!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I got too excited and went overboard. Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There, there. Are you okay, dear? Shall I get you
something to drink?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You looked so cute on that swing that I forgot to
stop you. My apologies.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, no. That would've been a fool's errand... I've
only got myself to blame.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's take a break. You can rest on my lap when
we get back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Here, lean on me. Unless... shall I carry you back?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: N-no, that's okay. Urgh... thank you, though.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry for wasting your time. Next time, I'll
be sure to start off nice and slow...

Leaning on Super Creek's shoulder as she totters
along, Sakura Chiyono O heads back to the
dorms.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay, I will. Why don't you two come along too?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That sounds great. We can have a nice, relaxing
chat while we swing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What a beautiful day... And swinging feels good. I
think I might be able to handle this...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's wonderful. I hope you overcome your
motion sickness soon. That way you can ride with
Maruzen again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! How'd you know all that?! I only mentioned
that I get motion sick easily.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're so cute when you're flustered. You
know, I can just tell these things.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen really is a wonderful Umamusume. It's no
wonder you look up to her so much.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yes! She really is so amazing and lovely and...

Given the chance to talk about Maruzensky,
Sakura Chiyono O lights up with admiration.

And this has the added bonus of taking all her
attention away from her motion sickness...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh wow... I feel totally fine. That's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I was so absorbed in our conversation that I
hardly noticed the swinging!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's like they always say! "Fall into a daze and
you'll never be fazed."

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You did so well today! You didn't get sick at all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Thanks to you two!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Worrying about getting sick might actually be
making it worse. I should distract myself as much
as possible.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I can master this, I might be able to handle cars
too! I can see a light at the end of this tunnel!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. ♪

It might not be a permanent solution, but Sakura
Chiyono O has found a small glimmer of hope for
her car ride dream.
